data.name: Jessica's Life The Beginning
data.detailed_description:
"Jessica’s Life: The Beginning" is a short visual novel/game that follows the sexual adventures of Jessica White. A cute, vivacious, fun loving blonde Jessica has an extremely open mind when it comes to sex along with a nearly anything goes attitude. While Jessica may come off as a major flirt who craves the attention of men, she is no simple tease as she strongly believes in giving her partners pleasure as much as she enjoys receiving it!



What's included:

- 2 main characters + 4 side characters
- 5 locations
- 3 choices/paths
- 4 sex scenes with several animations for each scene
- 16 animations/videos in total
- a lot of dialogues (about 500 lines with ca 5 000 words)
- some touch of humor (dialogues, situations)

As a FREE bonus to the game:
- A gallery of in-game and extra images in 4K resolution (DLC)
- HD videos from the game as separately playable video clips in .mp4 format (DLC)

Playtime is about one hour (if you play all paths and if you like to read as well as watch :)
All animations/movies shown in trailer and all the screenshots match the game content.

data.short_description: Follow the adventures of Jessica, a cute, sexy, fun loving blonde with an extremely open mind!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Core i3 of Sandy Bridge generation or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics Series (It needs 2GB memory allocation)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1/10
  • 處理器: Core i5 of Ivy Bridge generation or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce (VRAM 2GB or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
